hq_context.active_phase_reason: Validated engagement method via personal use. Landing page live at magnetx.co. Waitlist alone = weak signal. Need working product to show when reaching out individually.

phases.name: Personal X Growth
phases.last_work: 2/5 replies posted using /magnetx-engage. Wire scrape-x-profile still To Do.

phases.name: Validate
phases.last_work: Landing page deployed to Vercel (magnetx.co). Copy writing still To Do.

phases.name: Concierge
phases.last_work: Decision: build MVP first, skip manual experiment. Validated via personal use.

phases.name: Build MVP
phases.last_work: Tech stack decided. No code written yet. Next: backend niche fingerprinting.

open_decisions.question: Post freshness constraint
open_decisions.context: Replies on posts older than ~90min get buried. Users can't engage on stale posts.
open_decisions.options: A) Surface only posts <2h old B) Batch at optimal times C) Real-time feed

open_decisions.question: Curated accounts vs user timeline
open_decisions.context: Small accounts may not follow niche accounts. Curated = we control quality but less personalized.
open_decisions.options: A) Curated list B) User timeline C) Hybrid: curated default + user follows

open_decisions.question: User engagement time model
open_decisions.context: Users pick a ~20min window. Needs to align with when target accounts are most active.
open_decisions.options: A) Suggest optimal time B) On-demand C) Push notification on high-value post

settled_decisions: Skip Concierge phase — validated method via personal /magnetx-engage use
MVP before outreach — waitlist = weak signal. Show working product.
Pricing: $19/mo founding member for first 100 users, locked 1 year
Tech stack: Python FastAPI + HTMX + Jinja2. SQLite → Postgres when needed.
Apify over X official API — cheaper, no rate limits, swappable
Haiku over Sonnet — no user-visible quality gap for angles
AI writes angles, not replies — core product principle, non-negotiable
Stripe is last — add payment only when sharing externally
X Premium: Recommend in onboarding, don't require. Show loss without it.
Profile Readiness Check: Build into onboarding. Show what they're losing, don't gate.

completed_log.note: Decision: wrap as angles-only, skip drafts
Reply coach with 7 angle types, no drafts

completed_log.task: Set up daily habit streak tracker

completed_log.note: $19/mo founding, X Premium recommendation, profile readiness check
